data.description: US Panel: Venezuela seized tanker tied to China.

data.title: P&F's TRICAV II trial for tricuspid regurgitation gets FDA approval; to test effectiveness of TricValve® System.
data.description: P&F USA, a subsidiary of heart valve manufacturer P&F Products and Features GmbH, has revealed plans for TRICAV II. This trial aims to assess the safety and efficacy of the TricValve® Transcatheter Bicaval Valve System. The study is set to take place on December 12, 2025, in Wilmington, Del. The U.S. Food and Drug Administration will oversee the evaluation.

data.title: Former Louisiana AG and Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC are investigating Denny's sale to TriArtisan group.
data.description: A recent report from New York and New Orleans dated December 12, 2025, highlights the ongoing investigation by former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., and the legal firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) regarding the potential acquisition of Denny's Corporation (NasdaqCM: DENN). The sale in question involves a consortium led by TriArtisan. This evaluation aims to delve into the specifics of the transaction and its implications, with DENN's current stock market standing on the NasdaqCM also under scrutiny.

data.title: Former Attorney General of Louisiana and law firm KSF investigate sale of Mersana Therapeutics (Nasdaq: MRSN) to Day One Biopharmaceuticals.
data.description: A reputable law firm, Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, led by former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., is currently conducting an investigation into the planned acquisition of Mersana Therapeutics, Inc. (NasdaqGS: MRSN) by Day One Biopharmaceuticals, Inc. The transaction has attracted attention due to potential implications regarding the future of the companies involved. This analysis comes amidst a changing landscape in the biopharmaceutical industry, with Mersana Therapeutics, Inc.'s current market capitalization standing at around $500 million as per recent reports. The investigation aims to provide clarity on the terms and potential impacts of the proposed sale for shareholders and stakeholders in both companies.
US forces raid ship, seize cargo headed to Iran from China - WSJ.

data.title: Instant Hot Pot Self-Heating Rice Market Report added by ResearchAndMarkets.com, projecting global forecast for 2025-2032.
data.description: A recent report titled "Instant Hot Pot Self-Heating Rice Market - Global Forecast 2025-2032" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for instant hot pot self-heating rice is experiencing rapid evolution, driven by the growing demand from consumers worldwide for convenient meal options that provide genuine flavors and reliable quality. This growth is supported by advancements in self-heating technology and changing consumer lifestyles. The market is witnessing significant expansion in various regions and segments.

data.title: Former LA Attorney Gen. and Kahn Swick & Foti investigate Semler Scientific, Inc. sale to Strive, Inc. (NasdaqCM: SMLR & NasdaqGM: ASST).
data.description: In New York and New Orleans on December 12, 2025, an investigation is being conducted by former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC into the sale of Semler Scientific, Inc. (NasdaqCM: SMLR) to Strive, Inc. (NasdaqGM: ASST).

data.title: Chapters Health System rebrands grief support camps for children to Camp Brave Heart, unveiling new logo.
data.description: Temple Terrace, Florida - On December 12, 2025, Chapters Health System revealed the new name and logo for their grief support camp, now known as Camp Brave Heart. Chapters Health System is a prominent chronic illness innovator and the largest nonprofit hospice provider in the nation. The camp's unification under the name Camp Brave Heart marks a significant milestone for the organization.

data.title: Investigation ongoing regarding sale of Anywhere Real Estate Inc. (NYSE: HOUS) to Compass, Inc. (NYSE: COMP).
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in New York and New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., along with the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, announced an investigation into the potential acquisition of Anywhere Real Estate Inc. (NYSE: HOUS) by Compass, Inc. (NYSE: COMP). The former Attorney General of Louisiana and his firm are looking into the details of the sale to determine its implications for shareholders. This news marks a significant development in the mergers and acquisitions landscape, as investors await further information regarding the deal between the two companies on the stock market.

data.title: CPSC urges families to prevent CO poisoning and fires during winter storms, as millions in the US face threatening conditions.
data.description: In response to the winter storms and frigid weather impacting millions nationwide, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission is advising consumers to safeguard against carbon monoxide (CO) poisoning and fires. With temperatures plummeting, it is crucial for individuals to take preventative measures to ensure their safety. In the event of a power outage, using alternative heating sources such as generators or stoves can elevate the risk of CO exposure, highlighting the importance of proper ventilation and CO alarms. Stay informed and stay safe during this challenging season.

data.title: KSF Investigates Avadel Pharmaceuticals sale to Alkermes plc. Investigating adequacy of price and process.
data.description: A probe is underway by Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Louisiana Attorney General, and law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, into the planned acquisition of Avadel Pharmaceuticals plc (NasdaqGM: AVDL) by Alkermes plc (NasdaqGS: ALKS). The transaction details involve significant numbers in the stock market, with AVDL and ALKS on Nasdaq. This investigation is being conducted as of December 12, 2025, in locations including New York and New Orleans.

data.title: Hybrid AI production boosts BlockStrong by over 30%, winning 2025 Platinum MarCom Award. Directed by Steve Colby, produced by Tina Colby.
data.description: In Atlanta on December 12, 2025, Pogo Pictures/Colby2 and BrightRain Collaborative were honored with a prestigious 2025 Platinum MarCom Award for their outstanding work on BlockStrong's "Lipstick Pig" advertising campaign. The innovative campaign featured a blend of live-action elements and AI enhancements, with direction by Steve Colby and production overseen by Tina Colby. This recognition highlights the success of their collaborative efforts in creating impactful advertising content.

data.title: LS Cable & System to invest significantly in Chesapeake, VA, through 3 subsidiaries, marking largest capital investment in Hampton Roads region's history.
data.description: LS Cable & System Ltd. (LS C&S), a prominent player in power and communication cable solutions, recently revealed its intentions for a substantial investment in Chesapeake, Virginia. With three LS C&S subsidiaries involved, this project is anticipated to be the largest capital expenditure in the Hampton Roads area. This initiative adds to LS GreenLink's cutting-edge cable project that was previously announced. The investment signifies a major development for the region's economic landscape.

data.title: Teva (NYSE and TASE: TEVA) will discuss Q4 2025 financial results in a conference call on Jan 28, 2026, 8 a.m. ET.
data.description: Israeli company Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. will release its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, January 28, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The announcement will be followed by a conference call and live webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Teva is listed on both the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) and the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange (TASE).

data.title: Zevra Therapeutics grants 53,000 shares of common stock to 3 new employees under Employment Inducement Award Plan.
data.description: CELEBRATION, Fla., December 12, 2025 - Zevra Therapeutics, Inc. (NasdaqGS: ZVRA), a company specializing in rare disease therapies, has announced the granting of Inducement Awards to new employees. These awards allow the purchase of 53,000 shares of the Company's common stock. The recipients will receive the shares over a four-year period, with 25% becoming available on the first anniversary of their start date, and the rest vesting in equal parts annually thereafter, contingent upon their continued employment.

data.title: FMC Corp (NYSE: FMC) declared quarterly dividend of 8 cents/share, payable Jan 15, 2026, to shareholders as of Dec 31.
data.description: In Philadelphia on December 12, 2025, FMC Corporation (NYSE: FMC) disclosed that its board of directors has approved a standard quarterly dividend of 8 cents per share. The dividend is set to be paid on January 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of December 31, 2025.

data.title: Archena Alagappan named associate portfolio manager to Neuberger Berman Real Estate Securities Income Fund. #NYSE #NRO
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Neuberger Berman Real Estate Securities Income Fund Inc. (NYSE American: NRO) revealed the appointment of Archena Alagappan as the associate portfolio manager of the Fund. Alagappan, who is currently serving as the Senior Vice President, is expected to assume the new role effective immediately. Her experience and expertise will contribute significantly to the Fund's operations moving forward.

data.title: Huntington Bancshares sets $356.25 quarterly cash dividend on its 5.70% Series I Preferred Stock.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Columbus, Ohio, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated declared a quarterly cash dividend on their 5.70% Series I Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock (Nasdaq: HBANM). The Board of Directors set aside $356.25 per share for this dividend.

data.title: KB Home opens 2 new communities in Crosswinds Master Plan, Morgan Hill, California, boosting housing options.
data.description: KB Home has revealed the launch of two new neighborhoods in the coveted Crosswinds Master Plan in Morgan Hill, California. This announcement signifies a significant step in expanding the housing options in the region. Residents and prospective home buyers now have more opportunities to explore and invest in the flourishing real estate market of Morgan Hill. The communities are strategically positioned within the Crosswinds Master Plan, enhancing the overall appeal of the area. This move is expected to attract a wide range of buyers looking for modern living spaces in a well-connected and thriving neighborhood.
